scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix mobile && npm install --prefix web
scripts.build: npm install --prefix web && npm run build --prefix web
scripts.dev:api: wrangler dev --env-file env/server.example.env --env-file env/server/.env --var ENVIRONMENT:development --var PUBLIC_WEB_BASE:http://127.0.0.1:5173
scripts.dev:admin: npm install --prefix web/admin && npm run dev --prefix web/admin
scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
